item.title: Trade Marks Fee Update 2025 (Revised)
item.description: IP Australia has updated trade mark application fees effective 1 July 2025. CORRECTION: Fee increased to $350 per class.
item.content:encoded: IP Australia has updated trade mark application fees effective 1 July 2025. CORRECTION: The new fee for a standard application will be $350 per class, not $330 as previously stated.

item.title: Patent Opposition Changes
item.description: Changes to the patent opposition process take effect from 1 August 2025.
item.content:encoded: The Intellectual Property Laws Amendment Act 2025 introduces changes to the patent opposition process, including extended time limits and new grounds of opposition.
